name: ztrack
description: Plugins for ztrack — the deterministic done-oracle for agentic SDLC. Currently: ztrack-gate, a self-gating Stop hook that holds an agent's turn until the active issue passes `ztrack check`.

plugins.name: ztrack-gate
plugins.description: Stop hook that holds the agent's turn open until `ztrack check --auto-scope` is green for the issue this worktree is for — a deterministic done-oracle gate. Self-gating: it only acts in repos that have a ztrack tracker, so it is safe to enable globally.
